events.title: Basel III (QCB)
events.effect: Capital adequacy reported under Basel III; CET1/AT1/Tier-2 split; AT1 instruments (often sukuk) shown in equity.

events.title: IFRS 9 (expected credit losses)
events.effect: Loan-loss provisioning moves to forward-looking ECL with Stage 1/2/3; watch ECL coverage and staging migration.

events.title: Merged into Masraf Al Rayan (MARK)
events.effect: al khaliji merged into Masraf Al Rayan in 2021 and was delisted.
